\tzpentry{ID5454}{Sink Anti Sink Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5454 introduces Sink Anti Sink Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \lim_{t \to \tau} (\Psi_{sink} + \Psi_{anti-sink}) = \mathbf{0} \end{equation}
